debug_info.goal:
d : ℕ
A : Electromagnetism.DistElectromagneticPotential d
Λ : ↑(LorentzGroup d)
⊢ (Electromagnetism.DistElectromagneticPotential.deriv d)
      (@HSMul.hSMul (↑(LorentzGroup d)) (Electromagnetism.DistElectromagneticPotential d)
        (Electromagnetism.DistElectromagneticPotential d) instHSMul Λ A) =
    Λ • (Electromagnetism.DistElectromagneticPotential.deriv d) A

ext ε
  calc
    deriv (Λ • A) ε = ∑ μ, ∑ ν, (SpaceTime.distDeriv μ (Λ • A) ε ν) • Lorentz.CoVector.basis μ ⊗ₜ[ℝ] Lorentz.Vector.basis ν := rfl
    _ = ∑ μ, ∑ ν, ( (distDeriv (μ : Fin 1 ⊕ Fin d) (A : d := d) ε (ν : Fin 1 ⊕ Fin d) : ℝ) ) • (Λ⁻¹ • Lorentz.CoVector.basis μ) ⊗ₜ[ℝ] (Λ • Lorentz.Vector.basis ν) := by
      congr 1
      ext μ
      congr 1
      ext ν
      have h₁ : SpaceTime.distDeriv μ (Λ • A) ε ν = distDeriv (μ : Fin 1 ⊕ Fin d) (A : d := d) ε (ν : Fin 1 ⊕ Fin d) := by
        simp [SpaceTime.distDeriv_smul, Λ.map_smul, smul_smul]
        <;>
        simp_all [LorentzGroup.map_smul, smul_smul]
        <;>
        field_simp [LorentzGroup.map_smul, smul_smul]
        <;>
        ring_nf
        <;>
        simp_all [LorentzGroup.map_smul, smul_smul]
        <;>
        linarith
      rw [h₁]
      <;>
      simp [smul_smul]
      <;>
      simp_all [LorentzGroup.map_smul, smul_smul]
      <;>
      field_simp [LorentzGroup.map_smul, smul_smul]
      <;>
      ring_nf
      <;>
      simp_all [LorentzGroup.map_smul, smul_smul]
      <;>
      linarith
    _ = Λ • deriv A ε := by
      have h₂ : ∑ μ : (Fin 1 ⊕ Fin d), ∑ ν : (Fin 1 ⊕ Fin d), (distDeriv μ A ε ν : ℝ) • (Λ⁻¹ • Lorentz.CoVector.basis μ) ⊗ₜ[ℝ] (Λ • Lorentz.Vector.basis ν) = Λ • deriv A ε := by
        simp [deriv, Λ.map_smul, smul_smul]
        <;>
        simp_all [LorentzGroup.map_smul, smul_smul]
        <;>
        field_simp [LorentzGroup.map_smul, smul_smul]
        <;>
        ring_nf
        <;>
        simp_all [LorentzGroup.map_smul, smul_smul]
        <;>
        linarith
      simp_all [h₂]
      <;>
      simp_all [LorentzGroup.map_smul, smul_smul]
      <;>
      field_simp [LorentzGroup.map_smul, smul_smul]
      <;>
      ring_nf
      <;>
      simp_all [LorentzGroup.map_smul, smul_smul]
      <;>
      linarith

  have h1 : ∑ μ, ∑ ν, (SpaceTime.distDeriv μ (Λ • A) ε ν) • (Lorentz.CoVector.basis μ ⊗ₜ[ℝ] Lorentz.Vector.basis ν) = Λ • ∑ μ, ∑ ν, (SpaceTime.distDeriv μ A ε ν) • (Lorentz.CoVector.basis μ ⊗ₜ[ℝ] Lorentz.Vector.basis ν) := by
    have h2 : ∀ (μ ν : Fin 1 ⊕ Fin d), (SpaceTime.distDeriv μ (Λ • A) ε ν) = (SpaceTime.distDeriv μ A ε ν) := by
      intro μ ν
      have h3 : (SpaceTime.distDeriv μ (Λ • A) ε ν) = (SpaceTime.distDeriv μ A ε ν) := by
        simp [Action.distDeriv_smul, σ_smulAction]
        <;>

        <;>

      exact h3
    calc
      ∑ μ, ∑ ν, (SpaceTime.distDeriv μ (Λ • A) ε ν) • (Lorentz.CoVector.basis μ ⊗ₜ[ℝ] Lorentz.Vector.basis ν) = ∑ μ, ∑ ν, (SpaceTime.distDeriv μ A ε ν) • (Lorentz.CoVector.basis μ ⊗ₜ[ℝ] Lorentz.Vector.basis ν) := by
        apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
        intro μ _
        apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
        intro ν _
        rw [h2 μ ν]

3. By the chain

have h_main : ∀ (ε : 𝓢(SpaceTime d, ℝ)), deriv (Λ • A) ε = Λ • deriv A ε := by
    intro ε
    ext
    simp [deriv, distDeriv_smul, LinearMap.smul_map]
    <;>
    simp_all [Lorentz.affineLinearMap_map, Fintype.sum_mul, Fintype.mul_sum]
    <;>
    rw [Finset.sum_comm]
    <;>
    simp_all [mul_assoc, mul_comm, mul_left_comm]
    <;>
    congr 1 <;> ext <;> simp [Lorentz.affineLinearMap_map]
    <;>
    simp_all [mul_assoc, mul_comm, mul_left_comm]
    <;>
    ring_nf at *
    <;>
    simp_all [Lorentz.affineLinearMap_map]
    <;>
    congr 1 <;> ext <;> simp [Lorentz.affineLinearMap_map]
  
  have h_final : deriv (Λ • A) = Λ • deriv A := by
    -- Use the fact that if two distributions are equal on all test functions, then they are equal.
    have h₁ : ∀ (ε : 𝓢(SpaceTime d, ℝ)), deriv (Λ • A) ε = Λ • deriv A ε := h_main
    -- Use the extensionality lemma for distributions to conclude the proof.
    funext ε
    apply h₁
  
  exact h_final

ext ε
  calc
    (deriv (Λ • A) ε) = ∑ μ, ∑ ν, (SpaceTime.distDeriv μ (Λ • A) ε ν) • Lorentz.CoVector.basis μ ⊗ₜ[ℝ] Lorentz.Vector.basis ν := by
      rfl
    _ = ∑ μ, ∑ ν, (distDeriv μ Λ A ε ν) • Lorentz.CoVector.basis μ ⊗ₜ[ℝ] Lorentz.Vector.basis ν := by
      congr with μ
      congr with ν
      <;> rw [show distDeriv μ (Λ • A) ε ν = distDeriv μ Λ A ε ν by rfl]
    _ = Λ • deriv A ε := by
      calc
        _ = ∑ μ, ∑ ν, (distDeriv μ Λ A ε ν) • Lorentz.CoVector.basis μ ⊗ₜ[ℝ] Lorentz.Vector.basis ν := by rfl
        _ = Λ • deriv A ε := by
          simp [deriv, ContinuousLinearMap.map_smul]
          <;> rfl
